title: Network Evidence, Safety, and Troubleshooting Method
description: Operate a safe virtual help-desk lab with tickets, diagrams, baselines, commands, packet evidence, and change records. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a reproducible network evidence notebook while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use the N10-009 troubleshooting method before guessing fixes.
Protect production state and user data while gathering evidence.
Communicate symptoms, scope, cause, action, outcome, and prevention clearly.
